sn45.32:1.1:
1
Sāvatthinidānaṁ. "Micchāpaṭipannañca vo, bhikkhave, desessāmi, sammāpaṭipannañca. Taṁ suṇātha.
sn45.32:1.2: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, micchāpaṭipanno? Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco micchādiṭṭhiko hoti … pe … micchāsamādhi – ayaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, micchāpaṭipanno.
sn45.32:1.3: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, sammāpaṭipanno? Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco sammādiṭṭhiko hoti … pe … sammāsamādhi – ayaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, sammāpaṭipanno"ti.
